rows.finalText: The cards answer "What is the next right step in my calling" through Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. In Past, Key (33) shows where things already stand: resolution is available with focused action. Key colors your calling through the solution, certainty, and unlock layer of the situation, especially where resolution is available with focused action.
